title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at NTPC Capital India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at NTPC Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, NTPC Capital India in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About NTPC Capital India:
NTPC Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NTPC Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
